overview.short: Ghangad is a fort situated near 30km from Lonavala-Khandala and 100 km from Pune in Maharashtra state, India.
overview.description: Ghangad is a fort situated near 30km from Lonavala-Khandala and 100 km from Pune in Maharashtra state, India. It is an important fort in the Pune district. The fort restoration is done by the Shivaji Trail group with the help of local villagers. Restoration work took place in 2011-12.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Dongargaon, Mawal
topPlaces.description: Dongargaon is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 328.47 ha (812 acres).

topPlaces.name: Sudhagad
topPlaces.description: Sudhagad / Bhorapgad is a hill fort situated in Maharashtra, India. It lies about 53 kilometres (33 mi) west of Pune, 26 kilometres (16 mi) south of Lonavala and 11 kilometres (6.8 mi) east of Pali in Raigad District.

topPlaces.name: Thanale Caves
topPlaces.description: Thanale Caves or Nadsur Caves is a group of 23 Buddhist caves located 72 km (45 mi) to the southeast of Mumbai, in western Maharashtra, India, at Thanale Village, Taluka Sudhagad in Raigad, 18 km from Pali. These caves belong to first century B.C. It has two chaityas, two stupas and the rest are viharas.

topPlaces.name: Nenavali Caves
topPlaces.description: Nenavali Caves, also Khadsamble Caves, are located at Sudhagad in Raigad, India.

topPlaces.name: Adgaon, Mulshi
topPlaces.description: Adgaon is a village in Mulshi taluka of Pune District in the state of Maharashtra, India. The village is administrated by a Sarpanch who is an elected representative of the village as per constitution of India and Panchayati raj (India).

topPlaces.name: Akurdi, Mawal
topPlaces.description: Akurdi is a village in Mawal taluka, in Pune district, in the state of Maharashtra, India.It encompasses an area of 387 ha (956 acres).

topPlaces.name: Shilimb
topPlaces.description: Shilimb is a village in India, situated in the Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 1,221 ha (3,017 acres).

topPlaces.name: Aamby Valley City
topPlaces.description: Aamby Valley City is a township developed by the Sahara India Pariwar on the outskirts of Pune, India.

items.note: Dongargaon is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 328.47 ha (812 acres).

Sudhagad / Bhorapgad is a hill fort situated in Maharashtra, India. It lies about 53 kilometres (33 mi) west of Pune, 26 kilometres (16 mi) south of Lonavala and 11 kilometres (6.8 mi) east of Pali in Raigad District.

Thanale Caves or Nadsur Caves is a group of 23 Buddhist caves located 72 km (45 mi) to the southeast of Mumbai, in western Maharashtra, India, at Thanale Village, Taluka Sudhagad in Raigad, 18 km from Pali. These caves belong to first century B.C. It has two chaityas, two stupas and the rest are viharas.
Nenavali Caves, also Khadsamble Caves, are located at Sudhagad in Raigad, India.

Adgaon is a village in Mulshi taluka of Pune District in the state of Maharashtra, India. The village is administrated by a Sarpanch who is an elected representative of the village as per constitution of India and Panchayati raj (India).
Akurdi is a village in Mawal taluka, in Pune district, in the state of Maharashtra, India.It encompasses an area of 387 ha (956 acres).
Shilimb is a village in India, situated in the Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 1,221 ha (3,017 acres).
Aamby Valley City is a township developed by the Sahara India Pariwar on the outskirts of Pune, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ghangad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ghangad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (59 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (54 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ghangad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ghangad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ghangad?
faq.a: Stays in Ghangad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ghangad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dongargaon, Mawal, Sudhagad, Thanale Caves, Nenavali Caves, Adgaon, Mulshi.
